faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our community and events.

whatIs.a: Think Then Talk is a dynamic community for English learners and enthusiasts to practice speaking, build confidence, and connect with others through structured discussions and social events.

howToJoin.q: How can I join the community?
howToJoin.a: Joining is easy! Just browse our upcoming events, pick one that interests you, and register. You'll become a member of our growing community automatically.

isRegistrationRequired.q: Is registration required for every event?
isRegistrationRequired.a: Yes, to ensure the quality of discussions and manage capacity, registration is required for all our sessions.

howToPay.q: How can I pay for events?
howToPay.a: We use a token system called Talk Coins. You can purchase coins in our Coin Center and use them to register for any event or purchase a community pass.

onlineOrOffline.q: Are the events online or in-person?
onlineOrOffline.a: We offer both! We have online sessions for global accessibility and in-person meetups in various cities. Each event page clearly states the format.

refundPolicy.a: Talk Coins are non-refundable. However, if an event is cancelled by us, we will return the coins used for that specific registration to your balance.

terms.title: Collaboration Terms
terms.content:
By joining the Think Then Talk volunteer team, you agree to:

  • Support the community's inclusive environment.
  • Uphold the brand's professional standards.
  • Maintain confidentiality of sensitive community data.
